users.name: Ananya Sharma
users.aiAdvice: Based on your age (24) and high growth window, starting an equity-heavy SIP of ₹ 5,000 for 10+ years is ideal to beat inflation.

users.name: Ramesh Kumar
users.aiAdvice: Ramesh, at age 55, capital safety is priority. The SBI Conservative Hybrid Mutual Fund is ideal. Starting an autopay SIP of ₹ 2,000 ensures disciplined growth with minimum digital friction.

transactions.description: SBI Life eWealth Plus Policy setup initiated
